paper_title: A Meta-Analysis of Interventions to Reduce Loneliness
paper_authors: Masi, C. M.; Chen, H. Y.; Hawkley, L. C.; Cacioppo, J. T.

interventions.intervention_description: Systematic review and meta-analysis of 50 studies testing loneliness interventions classified into four categories: social skills training, enhanced social support, increased social interaction, and addressing maladaptive social cognition.

outcomes.outcome_description: Varied; mostly UCLA Loneliness Scale across the 50 included studies.

paper_title: Internet-Based Cognitive Behavior Therapy for Loneliness: A Pilot Randomized Controlled Trial
paper_authors: Käll, A.; Jägholm, S.; Hesser, H.; Andersson, F.; Mathaldi, A.; Norkvist, B. T.; Shafran, R.; Andersson, G.

interventions.intervention_description: 8-week therapist-guided internet-delivered CBT program targeting loneliness via psychoeducation, behavioral experiments, and cognitive restructuring of maladaptive interpersonal cognitions.

outcomes.outcome_description: UCLA Loneliness Scale Version 3 (UCLA-3); 20-item self-report scale measuring subjective loneliness.
